anti_claim: This manifest classifies public surfaces for validation policy. It does not make any surface release-ready or promote generated projections into source authority.

public_identity_prose.description: Human-facing identity, quickstart, and governance prose where Codex must not appear as a public product brand.

public_generated_projections.description: Generated public projections and atlas-style summaries. These may carry copied-source provenance refs but are not source doctrine.

public_evidence_graph_cards.description: Authored public-safe evidence cards that bind claims to receipt refs, omissions, and authority ceilings.

paper_module_markdown_projection.description: Legacy/import paper-module Markdown projections. JSON capsules are the migration target for source authority.

fixture_and_receipt_provenance.description: Fixture, receipt, and copied-source provenance surfaces; these are validated by fixture/source-module guards instead of prose brand scanning.
